vehicle_information.notes: This UK RHD Explorer is based on the North American platform and spans the PATS I/PATS II era. Do not apply European Fiesta/Mondeo blade assumptions. Confirm the physical blade, original remote frequency and transponder before supply.

tools.Programming route: OBD diagnostic or legacy PATS procedure

programming.add_key: Do not use Ford PATS route; exact MEB/Ford authorised tool coverage required
programming.all_keys_lost: Advanced connected-platform workflow; online authorisation and component-security restrictions likely apply
programming.online_requirement: Expected for security-sensitive operations; confirm exact procedure

vehicle_information.notes: The European Explorer EV is built on Volkswagen's MEB platform. Never inherit the legacy Explorer or normal Ford PATS procedure. Exact key part number, blade, frequency and supported tools remain current-platform research items.

tools.Online / FDRS: Expected for security-sensitive operations; confirm exact procedure
